behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names client.ts, #requestShape, fetchSnapshot, 409/must-refetch, -next suffix, build/stylecheck/unit-test requirements — all test-asserted specifics are discoverable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and required properties (random one-shot cache-buster) but doesn't prescribe exact code changes or function names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_retry_url_uniqueness requires `createCacheBuster` or `cacheBuster|CacheBuster` identifier to exist in compiled JS, which is a gold-specific helper name; an alternative fix using e.g. inline Math.random() with a differently-named helper would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run tsc, pnpm build, eslint, vitest subprocesses in addition to regex checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require build success plus absence of buggy pattern and presence of cache-buster — a stub would fail build/unit tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Compilation, build, stylecheck, unit tests, and behavioral absence of -next pattern are all covered as stated in instructions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have clear docstrings and descriptive function names grouped by concern (compile/build/behavior/style/unit).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands (packages/typescript-client, pnpm exec tsc, index.mjs) appear correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to client.ts and the two methods, which is appropriate scoping rather than exact line leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no agentmd config edits.
